query:
-- Create a new imaginary flight with 5 GPS waypoints
INSERT INTO flights (projectId, userId, name, description, flightDate, dronePilot, faaLicenseNumber, laancAuthNumber, mediaCount, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (
  1,
  1,
  'NYC Aerial Survey',
  'High-resolution aerial survey of Manhattan with 5 GPS waypoints',
  DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY),
  'Joe Pilot',
  '11111111',
  'LAANC',
  5,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);

-- Get the flight ID
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() as flight_id;
